title: Create & Electrics
description: A new experience with the Create mod and add-ons – physics, biomes, dungeons, and adventures.
body:
![Create Electrics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91dcf2bd2ae8deaeafafe5089a06c9e00daec462.png)

# Aeronautics IS OUT!
[Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) is now available in our modpack v1.0.0 – add physics to your mechanisms and fly!

# About Create & Electrics
### This modpack is an attempt to combine Create mods and addons with mods related to biomes, seasons, optimization, dungeons and etc. All in one, you could say.
